title: Stuck cap — Sara joins, both struggle
prompt: Mid-shot on @beach-shore at the wet tide line. @Eva already kneeling holding the @magic-bottle in both hands. @Sara already kneeling beside her in the wet sand, ponytail bouncing, both hands gripping the cork stopper of the bottle, tongue poking out in concentration as she twists hard. Sara (grunting playfully, tongue out): "It's STUCK! Why is it so stuck?" Eva (helping pull, both girls bracing against each other): "Pull HARDER!" The cork wobbles, the girls grimace dramatically, faces scrunched in determined effort. The bottle glows a tiny bit brighter as if reacting. Eva: "It's GLOWING!" Sara (twisting harder): "One — two — THREE!"
